intro.desc: Senior Full Stack Developer and maker based in İzmir. I architect robust Laravel systems and CRM solutions by day, and build custom IoT devices or 3D-printed prototypes by night. I'm driven by clean code, automation, and the occasional hum of a 3D printer working on a new experiment.

about.title: / about me
about.para1: I am a Senior Full Stack Developer and Maker currently focusing on independent projects and freelance solutions. Throughout my career, I've architected lead management engines, advanced CRM systems, and high-performance web applications for companies like Batigöz Health Group and otelfiyat.com.
about.para2: My core focus is building automated business processes through robust RESTful APIs and user-centric interfaces.
about.techStackIntro: Here are some technologies I have been working with:

desc: Contributed to the development of internal healthcare management systems and patient-facing modules.
Worked on full-stack features using modern web technologies, improving system performance and user experience.
Took part in the development of CRM & Admin modules in the otelfiyat.com project of Ideal Tur, a company serving in the tourism sector.
Designed and implemented RESTful APIs and backend services to support booking and reservation workflows.
Participated in the development and maintenance of company websites and applications.
Led the development of new projects from planning through deployment, collaborating closely with design and product teams.
Carried out many corporate works in the design agency as a co-founder.
Gained extensive experience in company management, client relations, and delivering end-to-end web solutions.
Took part in multiple projects, providing support for frontend design and backend management.
Developed interpersonal and professional skills while working alongside experienced developers.

nodeMailRedirector.desc: A Node.js application that monitors an IMAP email inbox and automatically forwards emails containing specific keywords to designated recipients.

phpUse.desc: A simple tool that allows you to easily switch between multiple PHP versions on Windows.

novaToast.desc: Nova Toast is a modern, lightweight, and framework-agnostic notification library designed for high-performance web applications.

arduinoMonitorAmbientLight.desc: Arduino based monitor ambient light management application.
